allow: Bash(cmd /c "taskkill /F /IM python.exe 2>&1 & taskkill /F /IM python3.exe 2>&1 & echo DONE")
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where name=''python.exe'' get processid,commandline 2>&1")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python* | Select-Object Id, Name, CPU | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python* 2>$null | Select-Object Id, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host ''Done''")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, Name -AutoSize; Write-Host ''Done''")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "cd /d ""C:\\Users\\smmgo\\Documents\\Generation Null Mastering app"" && git status && git log --oneline -5")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "cd /d ""C:\\Users\\smmgo\\Documents\\Generation Null\\Mastering app"" && git status && echo --- && git log --oneline -5")
